item.title: BME Student Society
item.description: What I Did I’ve served as president, industry liason, and social coordinator across 3 years. Website

item.title: UBC BEST
item.description: What I Did Work with arduinos and bluetooth to develop a rover which was remotely controlled. This rover allowed an elderly member of the community to carry heavier items longer distances. Website

item.title: UBC Orbit
item.description: What I Did Design an VIS-NIR imaging payload package for a cubesat with a spectral resolution of 53 meters. Website

item.title: About me
item.description: Hi! I’m Matthew, I’m a fourth year biomedical engineering student at the University of British Columbia. I specialize in software relating to healthcare. I also enjoy working with mechanical design and tinkering with microncontrollers. When I’m not working you can find me listening to or making music. I also serve on the Biomedical Engineering Undergraduate Student Society. During the winters you can find me skiing in the local mountains of Vancouver.
